cycles.code_config_data_tweak: Expanded backend structured catalog from 2 to 7 families and added lane_classification/live_proven fields.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: before: catalog_rows=2, lane_classification=true_structured only; after: catalog_rows=7 with true_structured=6 and secondary_search_derived=1.
cycles.impact_on_final_package_quality: Broader source universe and explicit lane typing reduce false claims of structured breadth.
cycles.next_tweak: Add unavailable/source-key provenance classification for OpenStates/Socrata.

cycles.code_config_data_tweak: Catalog annotation now promotes live_proven=true only for observed runtime candidates and forces secondary_search_derived to non-live.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: before: live_proven not enforced at catalog level; after: integrated families explicitly live_proven=true, secondary-search remains non-live.
cycles.impact_on_final_package_quality: Prevents unavailable or secondary snippets from being represented as integrated structured moat coverage.
cycles.next_tweak: Attach policy-lineage keys to structured candidates.

cycles.code_config_data_tweak: Added lineage_metadata (matter_id/event_date/event_body_id/source_identity) and policy_match metadata in structured enrichment candidates.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: before: no explicit lineage block on structured candidate; after: lineage metadata emitted on matter/event responses.
cycles.impact_on_final_package_quality: Policy package can now trace structured rows back to event/body/item identity.
cycles.next_tweak: Carry lineage fields into package-level structured provenance.

cycles.before_after_or_blocker: before: structured candidates had no reconciliation semantics; after: reconciliation intent present on all enriched structured outputs.
cycles.impact_on_final_package_quality: Enables explicit source-of-truth and conflict handling for cross-source alignment.
cycles.next_tweak: Enforce reconciliation in builder so unrelated fallback rows cannot pass.

cycles.code_config_data_tweak: Builder now marks structured_secondary_source as true_structured=false by default; schema carries true_structured in StructuredSourceProvenance.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: before: secondary snippets could be counted as structured lane depth; after: explicit true_structured=false prevents that credit.
cycles.impact_on_final_package_quality: True structured depth metric no longer inflated by Tavily snippets.
cycles.next_tweak: Require true-structured contribution or provenance depth for structured lane pass.

cycles.code_config_data_tweak: Builder reconciliation check now adds blocking_gate_present when structured source does not reconcile with primary policy keys.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: before: unrelated latest-event rows could flow without hard block; after: unreconciled structured fallback is fail-closed.
cycles.impact_on_final_package_quality: Removes unrelated/latest-event structured contamination from final package.
cycles.next_tweak: Propagate reconciliation status and confidence into structured provenance fields.

cycles.code_config_data_tweak: Extended StructuredSourceProvenance schema with policy_match/reconciliation + lineage fields and populated them from builder.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: before: structured provenance had only family/access/endpoint/field_count; after: includes true_structured, policy_match_key/confidence, reconciliation, event/body/matter identifiers.
cycles.impact_on_final_package_quality: Package now carries machine-auditable lineage and reconciliation metadata for structured lane.

cycles.code_config_data_tweak: Added regression test for malformed structured_policy_facts shape (dict instead of list) expecting fail-closed with blocking gate.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: before: no explicit regression proving drift handling; after: deterministic test guarantees no crash/no false pass.
cycles.impact_on_final_package_quality: Improves robustness against source-shape changes and prevents silent structured-lane pass.
cycles.next_tweak: Publish updated catalog artifact in policy-evidence-quality-spine artifacts.

cycles.code_config_data_tweak: Created structured_source_catalog_agent_b.json with lane types, access/auth status, live_proven, and runtime_status.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: before: no Agent-B scoped catalog artifact in quality-spine folder; after: versioned source-universe artifact present.
cycles.impact_on_final_package_quality: Gives cycle-ready audit artifact for structured lane universe claims.
cycles.next_tweak: Publish B1-B10 cycle ledger with measurable gate movements.

cycles.code_config_data_tweak: Created structured_lane_cycles_agent_b.md + JSON ledger with measured before/after and validation commands for B1-B10.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: before: no cycle-by-cycle structured-lane ledger for Agent B; after: complete B1-B10 records with next-step chain and gate impacts.
cycles.impact_on_final_package_quality: Provides auditable trace from code delta to gate movement and package-quality impact.
cycles.next_tweak: Run integrated live cycle against Windmill runtime once cross-agent dependencies land.
